info.title: Define Edge Agents API
info.description: LangGraph-based multi-agent system for financial market analysis

tags.name: Assistants
tags.description: An assistant is a configured instance of a graph.

tags.name: Threads
tags.description: A thread contains the accumulated outputs of a group of runs.

tags.name: Thread Runs
tags.description: A run is an invocation of a graph / assistant on a thread. It updates the state of the thread.

tags.name: Stateless Runs
tags.description: A run is an invocation of a graph / assistant, with no state or memory persistence.

tags.name: Crons (Plus tier)
tags.description: A cron is a periodic run that recurs on a given schedule. The repeats can be isolated, or share state in a thread

tags.name: Store
tags.description: Store is an API for managing persistent key-value store (long-term memory) that is available from any thread.

tags.name: A2A
tags.description: Agent-to-Agent Protocol related endpoints for exposing assistants as A2A-compliant agents.

tags.name: MCP
tags.description: Model Context Protocol related endpoints for exposing an agent as an MCP server.

tags.name: System
tags.description: System endpoints for health checks, metrics, and server information.

get.description:
Get all available strategies with master details.

This endpoint retrieves all strategy master records from the portfolio master file,
including strategy metadata such as description, risk level, keywords, and display name.

Returns:
    GetAllStrategiesResponse with all strategies and their master details

Raises:
    HTTPException: If loading strategies fails

Example:
    GET /api/strategies
    Response:
    {
        "strategies": [
            {
                "strategy": "conservative_equity",
                "description": "A conservative equity portfolio...",
                "risk_level": "Low",
                "keywords": "conservative, equity, low risk",
                "display_name": "Conservative Equity Portfolio",
                "category": "Equity",
                "stock_count": 25
            }
        ],
        "total_count": 1
    }

Get strategy analytics with portfolio holdings and screener enrichment.

This endpoint retrieves detailed analytics for a specific strategy, including:
- Strategy master details (description, risk_level, category, etc.)
- Portfolio holdings enriched with screener data (Company_Name, Industry, etc.)
- Holdings are sorted by weight in descending order

Args:
    strategy_name: Name of the strategy to retrieve

Returns:
    StrategyAnalyticsResponse with strategy details and enriched holdings

Raises:
    HTTPException: 404 if strategy not found, 500 for other errors

Example:
    GET /api/strategies/conservative_equity
    Response:
    {
        "strategy": "conservative_equity",
        "description": "A conservative equity portfolio...",
        "risk_level": "Low",
        "keywords": "conservative, equity, low risk",
        "display_name": "Conservative Equity Portfolio",
        "category": "Equity",
        "holdings": [
            {
                "Ticker": "RELIANCE",
                "weight": 15.5,
                "quantity": 100,
                "value": 250000,
                "CMP": 2500,
                "Company_Name": "Reliance Industries Ltd",
                "Industry": "Oil & Gas",
                "Size": "Large"
            }
        ],
        "total_stock_count": 25
    }

risk_level.title: Risk Level
risk_level.description: Risk level of the strategy (e.g., Low, Medium, High)

keywords.title: Keywords
keywords.description: Comma-separated keywords associated with the strategy

display_name.title: Display Name
display_name.description: User-friendly display name for the strategy

analytics.description: Comprehensive portfolio analytics including holdings, distributions, returns, scores, and exposures

StrategyAnalyticsResponse.title: StrategyAnalyticsResponse
StrategyAnalyticsResponse.description:
Response model for strategy analytics endpoint.

Contains strategy master details and comprehensive analytics including holdings.

holdings.title: Holdings
holdings.description: List of portfolio holdings with ticker, weight, and screener enrichment (Company_Name, Industry, Size, etc.). Uses flexible dict format to accommodate future screener columns.

total_stocks.title: Total Stocks
total_stocks.description: Total number of stocks in the portfolio

industry_distribution.title: Industry Distribution
industry_distribution.description: Industry distribution by net weight (can be negative for long-short portfolios)

size_distribution.title: Size Distribution
size_distribution.description: Size distribution by net weight (can be negative for long-short portfolios)

returns_chart_data.description: Cumulative returns chart data over time (Recharts line chart format)

overall_score_chart_data.title: Overall Score Chart Data
overall_score_chart_data.description: Overall score chart data for gauge/progress charts

risk_score_chart_data.title: Risk Score Chart Data
risk_score_chart_data.description: Risk score chart data for gauge/progress charts

net_exposure.title: Net Exposure
net_exposure.description: Net exposure (sum of signed weights) for long-short portfolios

gross_exposure.title: Gross Exposure
gross_exposure.description: Gross exposure (sum of absolute weights) for long-short portfolios

missing_holdings.title: Missing Holdings
missing_holdings.description: List of holdings that are missing from closing or screener data and excluded from analytics

PortfolioAnalytics.title: PortfolioAnalytics
PortfolioAnalytics.description:
Reusable portfolio analytics model.

This model contains comprehensive portfolio analytics that can be embedded
in any portfolio response (strategy portfolios, custom portfolios, etc.).

It provides a consistent structure for frontend components to display
portfolio analytics regardless of the portfolio type.

MissingHolding.title: MissingHolding
MissingHolding.description:
Ticker that is missing from closing or screener data.

Tracks holdings from the portfolio that could not be included in analytics
due to missing price or screener data.

label.title: Label
label.description: Label for the data item (e.g., 'Overall Score', 'Total')

ScoreChartDataItem.title: ScoreChartDataItem
ScoreChartDataItem.description:
Score chart data item for gauge/progress charts.

Used for displaying scores on gauge charts or progress bars.

data.title: Data
data.description: List of data points with 'date' (timestamp in ms) and return values for each symbol/portfolio

colors.title: Colors
colors.description: Map of symbol/portfolio names to color hex codes for chart lines

description.title: Description
description.description: Chart description with date range information

ReturnsChartData.title: ReturnsChartData
ReturnsChartData.description:
Returns chart data for line charts (Recharts format).

Contains time-series data for cumulative returns visualization.

DistributionItem.title: DistributionItem
DistributionItem.description:
Distribution item for pie charts (Recharts format).

This format is compatible with Recharts pie chart components.

strategies.title: Strategies
strategies.description: List of all available strategies with their master details

GetAllStrategiesResponse.title: GetAllStrategiesResponse
GetAllStrategiesResponse.description: Response model for getting all strategies with master details.

risk_level.title: Risk Level
risk_level.description: Risk level of the strategy (e.g., Low, Medium, High)

keywords.title: Keywords
keywords.description: Comma-separated keywords associated with the strategy

display_name.title: Display Name
display_name.description: User-friendly display name for the strategy

stock_count.title: Stock Count
stock_count.description: Number of unique stocks in the strategy portfolio
